title: Pharmacy Technician
description:
Syneos Health is a fully integrated biopharmaceutical services company supporting clinical research and patient care innovations.

We're seeking a Pharmacy Technician to join our Clinical Research team in Bethesda. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Prepare and dispense medications under supervision of licensed pharmacist
Maintain pharmacy inventory and track medication usage
Process prescription orders and insurance claims
Ensure accurate labeling and patient safety in medication dispensing
Maintain clean, organized pharmacy workspace and equipment
Support clinical trial medication management and documentation

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; pharmacy technician certification required
requirements.experience_years: 1-2 years of pharmacy or medication handling experience
